header.title: PORTFOLIO
header.subtitle: Take a look at our work!

mymadeira.title: Madeirise
mymadeira.subtitle: Madeira – The island of eternal spring
mymadeira.description1: A visually rich travel portal showcasing Madeira for hikers, explorers, and nature lovers. Stunning sliders, galleries, hiking info, and local tips guide the visitor, while the design remains clean and emotionally engaging.
mymadeira.description2: A perfect example of turning a destination into an experience

alakformalas.title: Body Shaping Pilisvörösvár
alakformalas.subtitle: Body shaping like you’ve never seen
alakformalas.description1: A site born from the personal story of Veronika Kiss-Horn, presenting cellulite massage, maderotherapy, and HIEMT treatments. Educational, trust-building, and authentic — services are clearly explained with visuals and technical details.
alakformalas.description2: An example of turning a personal story into a trusted brand

hairflair.title: HairFlair (demo)
hairflair.subtitle: Emma Saradeth – Hair artistry with heart
hairflair.description1: A German-language demo site that conveys the vibe of a friendly, modern hair salon. Services (cutting, coloring, care) are presented with professional images and precise descriptions. The design is warm, welcoming, yet elegant.
hairflair.description2: A great example of personal branding in the beauty industry

nimbusx.title: Nimbus-X (demo)
nimbusx.subtitle: Aerial tours in Madeira – NIMBUS-X
nimbusx.description1: This site presents an exclusive aerial tour service, offering bird’s-eye views of Madeira. Visual storytelling, flight routes, booking system, and fleet presentation all suggest a premium experience.
nimbusx.description2: This isn’t just travel — it’s airborne experience design

fitnessworld.title: Fitnessworld (demo)
fitnessworld.subtitle: Modern fitness platform and webshop in one
fitnessworld.description1: Fitnessworld is an Angular-based fitness webshop where users can book personal training sessions, group classes, and purchase products — all in one place. The cart, Stripe payments, and order management are fast, secure, and intuitive.
fitnessworld.description2: Behind the scenes, a clean admin dashboard makes managing trainers, classes, and products simple and transparent. Fitnessworld shows how a fitness brand can become a true digital experience.

portuplay.title: Portuplay (demo)
portuplay.subtitle: Learn Portuguese through play – PortuPlay
portuplay.description1: A grassroots initiative offering playful Portuguese language learning. Memory games, song translations, and vocabulary building — all visually supported. The design is youthful, energetic, and educational.
portuplay.description2: A perfect fusion of learning and play
